world.title: How a US blockade on Iran has sanctioned ships turning around
world.description: The U.S. Navy is imposing a sea blockade against Iran — the latest escalation in the war that has seen the flow of key energy supplies choked off at the Strait of Hormuz

world.title: Critical Atlantic current significantly more likely to collapse than thought
world.description: Scientists say finding is ‘very concerning’ as collapse would be catastrophic for Europe, Africa and the Americas

world.title: Japan's decade-long march towards arms exports
world.description: Japan has spent the past decade steadily dismantling some of the world's toughest arms export restrictions as it steps back from the postwar pacifism that shaped its security policy.

world.title: Ukraine's Zelenskyy pursues more arms deals with allies
world.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy says his country's top priority is securing help to buy and build more air defense systems. Russia continues its attacks on civilians and infrastructure, and...

world.title: US may be eyeing Strait of Malacca after Hormuz
world.description: As tensions escalate around the Strait of Hormuz, where the US is intensifying pressure on Iranian-linked maritime activity, a parallel development in Southeast Asia is drawing attention.

world.title: Does Viktor Orbán’s defeat signal a wider backlash against ‘the forces of darkness’?
world.description: Péter Magyar’s stunning victory in Hungary is a boost for liberal democracy. But don’t bank on similar upsets in upcoming European elections

world.title: Trump 'planning invasion of Cuba' as attack 'could be imminent'
world.description: Trump's White House has reportedly issued an order to ramp up planning in case the US 'intervenes' in Cuba.

world.title: SantaCon organiser charged with stealing $1m from charity pub crawl
world.description: Prosecutors say Stefan Pildes spent hundreds of thousands of $2.7m raised for charity on personal expenses.

business.title: Future Long Range Assault Aircraft Officially Named MV-75 Cheyenne II
business.description: MV-75 Cheyenne II officially named by the U.S. Army

business.title: A New Policy Framework for Governing Collective Sentiment in Online Communities
business.description: Online communities are shaped not only by rules and enforcement, but by the emotional climates that develop within them, writes Taylor Moore.

business.title: FCC exempts Netgear from ban on foreign routers, doesn't explain why
business.description: Trump FCC starts handing out exemptions to its ban on foreign-made routers.

business.title: Logansport Financial Corp. Reports Net Earnings for the Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
business.description: LOGANSPORT, Indiana, April 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Logansport Financial Corp., (OTCBB, LOGN), parent company of Logansport Savings Bank, reported net earnings for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 of $542,000 or $0.88 per diluted share, compared to earnings in 2025 of $377,000 or $0.61 per diluted share. The Dividends paid to shareholders were $0.45 per share in the first quarter of 2026.

business.title: Trump threatens to fire Fed chair Jerome Powell if he does not step down at the end of his term - US politics live
business.description: President has nominated Kevin Warsh to replace Powell, whom he has repeatedly attacked over interest rate decisions

business.title: sanctioned LNG from Russia heading for India: Report
business.description: India Business News: A Russian liquefied natural gas cargo from the Portovaya plant on the Baltic Sea is currently en route to India, with the vessel Kunpeng expected to a.

business.title: Son of Noel O'Callaghan 'greatly regrets' telling him he wanted to 'shoot' him over bitter business dispute
business.description: In papers submitted to the court, Paul O'Callaghan submits that there had been a 'significant deterioration' in the relationship with his father since August 2024.

business.title: Name a Bigger Book Launch? Tory Burch and DVF Hosted the Latest Celebration for Newly-Minted Author Emma Grede
business.description: “I'm very proud,” the CEO and co-founder of Good American and a founding partner of Skims told Vogue while reflecting on her latest accomplishment. Now, she has added author to her impressive resume with her debut book, Start With Yourself: A New Vision for Work & Life.

science.title: A bucket of NYC river water explains a lot about the Anthropocene
science.description: Scientists scooping eDNA from buckets of East River water discovered a powerful new tool for monitoring cities—one that costs far less than the alternatives.

science.title: Astrochemistry Update: SPHEREx Maps Vast Galactic Ice Regions
How the Artemis II crew made out-of-this-world images
science.description: The Artemis II astronauts made many mind-blowing images during their historic lunar mission earlier this month. They have two NASA trainers to thank for equipping them with tried-and-true digital SLR cameras and sharing their photo skills.

science.title: Dark matter could explain earliest supermassive black holes
science.description: Dark matter decays could be the missing ingredient explaining how giant black holes formed before the first stars

science.title: New Einstein Cross Reveals Surprising Galaxy Evolution
science.description: Astronomers discover a rare Einstein Cross around galaxy J1453g, revealing unexpected stellar properties that challenge existing galaxy formation theories.

science.title: 'Something's missing': Most thorough-ever study of the cosmos proves we still can't explain how the universe is expanding
science.description: A comprehensive new study combines decades of research to reveal that we're missing an essential component in our understanding of how the universe works.

science.title: CETI / SETI: The Phonology Of Sperm Whale Coda Vowels
UF astronomer helps build largest 3D map of the universe ever created
science.description: A University of Florida astronomer is helping lead a groundbreaking effort to create the largest 3D map of the universe, using data from the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument.

ai.title: A Tectonic Shift in AI Is Underway and AMD Stock Is No Longer a ‘Discount’ Competitor to Nvidia. It’s a Bet on the Future.
ai.description: AMD is evolving from a budget alternative into a formidable competitor to Nvidia by overcoming the CUDA software barrier. This analysis examines AMD’s explosive financial growth and its strategic positioning as a core provider of global AI infrastruc...

ai.title: Gemini Mac app puts Google AI right in your workflow
ai.description: The new Gemini for Mac app integrates into your workflow for quicker and easier AI access, hopefully improving productivity.

ai.title: Allbirds Stock Soars 670% On Sneaker To AI Pivot
ai.description: Allbirds stock is soaring on an unusual pivot from sneakers to AI infrastructure.

ai.title: Parasail raises $32M to build ‘AI Supercloud’ that deploys and scales AI agents in minutes
ai.description: The race to control AI infrastructure is shifting fast, and Parasail wants to sit right in the middle of it. The AI startup says it has raised $32 million in Series A funding, bringing its total to $42 million. The round was co-led by Touring Capital and Kindred Ventures, with backing from Samsung NEXT, Flume

ai.title: TCS slows dividend tap to fund AI push, cuts payouts for second year
ai.description: The company cut dividend payout and increases retained earnings as it seeks to make new investments in AI space and data centres

ai.title: Accel raises $5 billion AI fund after Anthropic and Cursor returns soar
ai.description: Accel has raised $5 billion for late-stage AI investments, backed by soaring returns from Anthropic and Cursor, in a Q1 2026 venture market that deployed a record $297 billion.

ai.title: Technological Renaissance in UP: New Centre of Excellence Inaugurated
ai.description: Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath inaugurated a state-of-the-art Centre of Excellence at the Maharana Pratap Institute of Technology, supported by TCS Foundation. The centre aims to advance AI, machine learning, and other technologies, contributing to regional and national development.

ai.title: The Allbirds pivot to… meme stock?
ai.description:
Verge favorite Matt Levine weighs in on the New Allbirds Thing. The financing is the crucial part — so some “institutional investor” is “essentially buying $50 million worth of stock at the old, defunct-sneaker-company price, and selling it at the new, AI-neocloud-company price,” maybe. Neocloud market looking frothy, imo.
[Link: AIbirds | https://www.bloomberg.com/opinion/newsletters/2026-04-15/aibirds?sref=M8H6LjUF | Bloomberg]
